title: nicotiana tabacum var. fruticosa
intro: Nicotiana tabacum var. fruticosa, also known as dwarf tobacco or bush tobacco, is a variety of the Nicotiana tabacum plant, which is a type of flowering plant native to the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nicotiana tabacum var. fruticosa include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to act as a natural cough suppressant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin conditions.
